name: There's No Way You Could Defeat Me!!

issues.description: Missing power restriction on KO target. The effect should only target Characters with 6000 base power or less, but no basePowerLimit is specified in the target.
Missing 'up to 1' targeting specification. The target should be optional (upTo: true) and limited to count: 1.
Spurious Trigger effect at effects[1]. The card only has a [Counter] effect, not a [Trigger] effect. This extra effect should not exist.
